summary: Comprehensive testing of match loading state handling fixes completed successfully. All primary requirements verified: rapid league filter switching without error flashing, proper page refresh behavior, skeleton loading during transitions, and appropriate error handling.
passed_tests: ✅ Rapid league filter switching (All → Serie A → Bundesliga → La Liga → Premier League → All) - NO ERROR FLASHING detected
✅ Page refresh shows proper loading behavior - no error messages appear during refresh
✅ Loading skeleton displays during league filter transitions (detected in 4/5 switches)
✅ Error messages only appear for genuine API failures (not during normal operation)
✅ Matches display correctly after filter switching settles (47 matches found)
✅ App handles very rapid filter switching (50ms intervals) without race conditions
✅ Appropriate empty states shown when no matches available (e.g., 'No live matches right now')
✅ Cache-based loading prevents initial loading flash on page load
✅ fetchIdRef pattern prevents stale fetch responses from updating state
✅ initialFetchDone ref prevents error flash before first successful response

success_percentage.backend: 100% - No backend issues detected during testing
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All loading state requirements successfully implemented
